1-for-20 reverse split effective 5pm ET 2024-09-04; trades post-split 2024-09-05 under BIRD; new CUSIP 01675A208
Net revenue -18.3% YoY to $32.1M; declines from intl distributor transitions + store closures
Entered Credit Agreement (Second Avenue Capital Partners LLC, agent); filed S-3 shelf (File 333-288434); TD Securities ATM established
Net revenue -23.1% YoY to $39.7M; FY25 guidance lowered (to ~$165-180M from $175-195M)
Form 8-K filed (Item per index); see filing list
Net revenue -23.3% YoY to $33.0M; FY25 revenue guidance cut to ~$161-166M; cited $23-25M impact from distributor transitions + US store closures
Will close all remaining full-price US stores by end of Feb 2026; keep 2 US outlets + 2 London full-price; capital-light turnaround framing (CEO Vernachio)

APA with Allbirds IP LLC (affiliate of American Exchange Group / AXNY); est. transaction value $39M; sells brand + IP + certain assets/liabilities

event: Asset sale announced; Q4/FY25 call cancelled
detail: Public announcement of $39M AXNY asset sale + planned Dissolution; Q4 FY25 earnings call (sched 2026-03-31) cancelled; TD Cowen financial advisor

Securities Purchase Agreement w/ unnamed institutional investor: senior secured convertible notes up to $50M; 12% coupon; 5% OID; 2yr maturity; toxic Alt Conversion = 93% of lowest 10-day VWAP; only $5.25M committed initial tranche, $44.75M at investor option; NewBird AI LLC subsidiary; investor 55% co-invest right 24mo

Shares fade 36% to ~$12.03 (biggest drop in ~3 years)
BIRD halted on volatility trading pause amid whipsaw
Securities Purchase Agreement amended/restated; Second Amendment to Credit Agreement same period

Special Meeting set; proposals: Asset Sale, Dissolution-of-footwear, Nasdaq 19.99% issuance, name change to NewBird AI Inc, adjournment; est. net proceeds ~$35.0-36.2M; est. Asset Sale Dividend ~$1.34/share; $1.25M termination fee; superior-proposal fiduciary out
